genres.name: Afrofuturism
genres.aiBias: vibrant intricate patterns, advanced technology integrated with traditional motifs, golden hour lighting, hyper-detailed futuristic architecture, lush cosmic energy.

genres.name: Cyberpunk Neon
genres.aiBias: neon-drenched streets, rain-slicked pavement, high-tech low-life, cinematic volumetric lighting, cybernetic enhancements, holographic advertisements.

genres.name: Hardboiled Noir
genres.aiBias: high-contrast monochrome, dramatic chiaroscuro lighting, heavy film grain, 1940s urban atmosphere, smoke-filled rooms, venetian blind shadows.

genres.name: Ethereal Fantasy
genres.aiBias: magical forest glades, floating islands, soft bioluminescent flora, ornate ancient architecture, wispy arcane energy, dreamlike atmosphere.

genres.name: Vaporwave / 80s Retro
genres.aiBias: pastel sunset gradients, low-poly aesthetics, 1980s retro-futurism, digital glitches, marble statues, palm tree silhouettes.

genres.name: Gritty Urban / Street
genres.aiBias: modern city streets, graffiti-covered walls, overcast lighting, raw handheld camera feel, hyper-realistic urban textures, cinematic drama.

genres.name: Golden Age Heroic
genres.aiBias: bright primary colors, classic pop-art style, halftone dots, high-energy action poses, clean bold outlines, 1950s comic book aesthetic.

genres.name: Cosmic Horror
genres.aiBias: unsettling surreal landscapes, non-euclidean geometry, deep sea depths, void-like darkness, strange tentacles, eldritch glowing runes.

genres.name: Celestial Romance / Adventure
genres.aiBias: tasteful intimate atmosphere, soft starlight diffusion, ethereal nebula backgrounds, romantic cinematic lighting, glowing skin textures, epic scale architecture, warm and inviting color grade.

genres.name: Mythic Odyssey
genres.aiBias: ancient deities and champions of color, ornate bronze and gold detailing, sun-drenched marble, Mediterranean horizons, heroic epic proportions, divine aura effects, classical grandeur.

genres.name: Solarpunk Optimism
genres.aiBias: verdant green architecture, harmonious technology and nature, bright natural daylight, inclusive communal spaces, utopian atmosphere, vibrant blue skies, lush vertical gardens.

genres.name: Psychic Thriller / Surreal
genres.aiBias: abstract geometric distortions, floating fragments of memory, shifting prismatic light, surreal dream logic, cerebral atmosphere, high-saturation color bleeds, ripples in reality.

genres.name: Retro-Pulp Adventure
genres.aiBias: 1930s adventure aesthetic, aged parchment textures, deep jungle ruins, warm sepia undertones, dramatic action lighting, vintage film grain, bold globe-trotting heroism.

genres.name: Techno-Arcane / Magic Tech
genres.aiBias: collision of sorcery and circuitry, glowing mana-pipes, runic holograms, dark mystical technology, deep indigo shadows, sparking magical energy, high-fantasy industrialism.

genres.name: Noir Romance
genres.aiBias: moody low-light intimacy, rain-streaked windows, soft jazz club atmosphere, deep crimson accents, elegant silhouettes, soulful expressions, cinematic melancholy.
